import json
import re

def extract_prices(data):
    pattern = r'\d+\.\d{2}'
    return [float(re.findall(pattern, line)[0]) for line in data]

json_string = '{"System": { "Date": ["2021-01-02", "2021-01-05", "2021-01-08", "2021-01-12", "2021-01-15", "2021-01-20", "2021-01-22"], "Prices": [142.35, 142.85, 143.35, 143.85]}}'
data = json.loads(json_string)['System']
prices = extract_prices(data)
print(prices)
